Flat flexible: general photo index of marine life on Singapore shores

Photo index of marine life on Singapore shores

Flat flexible: thin sheets, attached to a hard surface


red seaweed


red seaweed


green seaweed


green seaweed


corallimorphs


corallimorphs

Flat flexible: thin sheets, moving and/or not attached to a hard surface


sea slug


flatworm


flatworm


sea slug


sea slug


flatfish


stingrays


horseshoe crab


sand collar

Flat flexible: thick or large sheets


soft coral


soft coral


soft coral


sea anemone

how to tell apart

  • flatworms and slugs
  • the flatfish families commonly seen
  • fishes with flat heads
  • large ‘hairy’ cnidarians

lifeforms on this site
